project-metadata.name: pkglist
project-metadata.description: A stylish CLI & TUI tool for package space and dependency tree analysis.

constraint.directive: Do NOT alter the space calculation algorithms. Both transitive_size (dependency tree) and exclusive_size (saved space reference-counting garbage collection simulation) have been optimized and validated to resolve RPM dependency cycles and shared/exclusive dependency states correctly.

The graph module (graph.rs) MUST remain backend-agnostic. It defines the PackageInput interface struct and must NOT contain any packaging-system-specific logic (RPM capability parsing, dnf filtering, version constraint stripping, etc.). All packaging-system-specific dependency resolution belongs in the backend module (currently dnf.rs). New backends (e.g., apt.rs, pacman.rs) should produce Vec<PackageInput> with pre-resolved dependency indices and plug directly into graph::build_graph without any modifications to graph.rs.

Do NOT change the state machine parser or the dnf5 queryformat arguments. The parser depends on a custom delimited structure (=PKG=, =SIZE=, =REQ=, =PROV=, =END=) to parse all 3700+ packages in milliseconds. Modifying one without the other will break system database querying.

Do NOT remove or overwrite the custom keyboard interaction layout: - Navigation: WASD keys ('w'/'s') and Arrow keys ('Up'/'Down') scroll lists. - Panel switching: Left/Right arrow keys and 'a'/'d' keys toggle focus between Packages table and Package Details. - Sorting: Hotkeys '1' to '4' sort columns. - Search: Hotkey 'f' enters search. 'Esc' cancels and clears search. 'Enter'/'Tab' close search but preserve query. - Jumps: Pressing 'Enter' on any dependency/dependent item in Details jumps focus and selection to that package.
Do NOT modify package names or editions without user consent.
